## ✅ Quality Checklist
Please confirm this resource meets our quality criteria:

- [ ] **Deep and Technical**: Explains JavaScript mechanisms and internals, not just syntax
- [ ] **Unique Value**: Offers insights not found in other existing resources
- [ ] **Expert Author**: Written by a recognized JavaScript expert or educator
- [ ] **Well-Explained**: Clear, comprehensive, and accurate content
- [ ] **Accessible**: URL is working and content is freely accessible
- [ ] **Relevant**: Fits within the Frontend Masters course structure

## 📋 Additional Information
<!-- Any additional context, notes, or information about this resource -->

**Submission Method:** 
- [ ] Submitted via website form

**For Maintainers:**
- [ ] Resource reviewed for quality
- [ ] No duplicates found
- [ ] Added to `resources.js`
- [ ] Website redeployed
- [ ] Issue closed with live link
